_comment: Per-tier wholesale pricing rules. These map onto the SAME pricing engine the internal line-sheet builder uses (src/linesheets/pricing.js), so portal prices never drift from the interface. All wholesale prices are rounded to whole dollars. Edit the values below to change pricing, then re-run the catalog build.

_modes.pct_off_compare_at: price = compare_at (MSRP) * (1 - value/100); falls back to current price if no compare_at
_modes.pct_off_current: price = current price * (1 - value/100); value 0 = ride current price as-is. Use this for a flat % off the live price.
_modes.fixed: price = value (a flat dollar amount for every style in the tier)
_modes.pct_of_higher: price = max(compare_at * value/100, unit_cost) — never below cost; falls back to current price if no compare_at

full._desc: Full-price styles: 50% of MSRP (compare-at), floored at unit cost.

off._desc: Off-price styles: ride the current (already-marked-down) price. To switch to a flat % off retail instead, set default_value to the % and keep default_mode 'pct_off_current' (off the live price) or change to 'pct_off_compare_at' (off MSRP).
